title: PWM LED dimmer via MOSFET
prompt: I want to dim a 12 V LED strip from my Arduino (ATmega328) using PWM. Drive an N-channel MOSFET low-side switch from a PWM-capable pin, with the LED strip between 12 V and the drain, so the average brightness follows the duty cycle. Firmware sets the PWM duty. Treat the strip as a resistive load and assume the FET is on for the DC bench check.
